@thomaspd

import re
stanzas = open('go-edit.obo').read().split('\n[Term]\n')
rows=[]
for s in stanzas:
    sid=re.search(r'^id: (GO:\d+)', s, re.M)
    name=re.search(r'^name: (.+)', s, re.M)
    if not sid: continue
    obs = re.search(r'^is_obsolete: true', s, re.M)
    rido = re.findall(r'^intersection_of: results_in_development_of (\S+) ?(?:! (.+))?$', s, re.M)
    genus = re.findall(r'^intersection_of: (GO:\d+) ?(?:! (.+))?$', s, re.M)
    if rido:
        for tgt,lbl in rido:
            rows.append((sid.group(1), name.group(1) if name else '', tgt, lbl or '', bool(obs), [g for g in genus]))
# summarize by target prefix
from collections import Counter
c=Counter(r[2].split(':')[0] for r in rows)

# write full lists

po=[r for r in rows if r[2].startswith('PO:') and not r[4]]

content.text:
Analysis posted to issue #22994 ([comment](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/22994#issuecomment-4482956466)). No ontology edits made — this was a parent-relationship query.

**Summary of findings:**

I partitioned every non-obsolete term carrying `results_in_development_of` by the source ontology of its differentia, applying the thread's own principle that *a cell is not a gross anatomical part*:

| Bucket | Count | Disposition |
|---|---|---|
| **Animal → GO:0160108** | **590** | UBERON multicellular-anatomy `X development` terms |
| **Plant → GO:0160109** | **61** | PO anatomy terms (4 plant-cell terms excluded) |
| Animal cell dev (CL) | 99 | cellular, not gross anatomical part |
| Plant cell dev (PO cells) | 4 | cellular, not gross anatomical part |
| Subcellular (GO CC) | 4 | dendrite/pollen tube — out of scope |
| Fungal (FAO) | 10 | neither animal nor plant |
| Dictyostelium (DDANAT) | 1 | sorocarp sorus — the @pfey03 case |

`GO:0048856 anatomical structure development` is the genus/superclass and was excluded from the 590.

I recommended the GO-idiomatic fix rather than ~650 hand-asserted `is_a` edges: give GO:0160108/GO:0160109 logical definitions (`GO:0048856` genus + `results_in_development_of` some multicellular-anatomy / plant-anatomy grouping class) so the reasoner classifies them automatically. That's blocked on two upstream coordination points already raised in the thread — `UBERON:0010000` isn't imported into go-edit.obo yet, and PO still lacks the agreed plant grouping class. I offered to open a small PR adding just the two logical definitions once those classes are available. Full 590 + 61 lists are in the comment for verification.
